title: Welcome to Gold Rush to Boomtown
text:
Hi! I’m Strider, your AI guide for today’s journey. I’ll walk you through the tour and share stories at each stop. The tour plays hands-free—as you approach the stop, I’ll start talking. Prefer to take control or change the order? Manual controls are always available—you can pause, replay, or skip anytime —it’s your adventure. Use the map to follow the route. For the best experience, keep the location on and volume up (headphones recommended). I’ll do my best to make this great, but hey—I’m not perfect. If I miss something or get a detail wrong, please let me know—promise, I won’t take it personally.

[long pause]

Welcome to the Gold Rush to Boomtown tour in San Francisco!

[pause]

The tour traces how a sleepy Mexican plaza became an American boomtown, repeatedly destroyed and reborn by fire, finance, and fevered dreams of gold. At each stop you’ll see how fortunes, laws, and even empires were forged in saloons, countinghouses, and temples, while immigrants, vigilantes, and visionaries battled over who would truly own “Gold Mountain.”

[pause]

All right — let’s get going.
